calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for Gene Marchi.

Ms. Navia presented oral argument to support the request of extraordinary fees. The Court is inclined to approve the accounting with the exception that it will not approve Petitioner's sale of the securities without Court order. The issue of fees was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Ruiz.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Continued To Oct-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for Gene Marchi.

Ms. Navia stated that the Ex Parte Petition to Amend Letters was filed and that the amendment to the accounting has been served. The accounting petition was continued to October 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for hearing on the Amended First and Final Account.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Continued To Oct-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
